channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump tells Fed chair Warsh: "Don't look at me, don't look at anybody"
item.description: The Warsh era begins with rising inflation, an energy shock from the Middle East, and skepticism among colleagues about rate cuts.

item.title: Tulsi Gabbard resigns as director of national intelligence
item.description: Tulsi Gabbard, President Trump's director of national intelligence, announced Friday she is leaving the administration. Driving the news: Gabbard wrote...

item.title: Trump met top advisers on Iran as he weighs return to war
item.description: President Trump convened a meeting with his senior national security team on the war with Iran on Friday morning, two U.S. officials told Axios. Why it...

item.title: Pakistani field marshal in Tehran to try to seal U.S.-Iran deal
item.description: Pakistan's top military commander, Field Marshal Asim Munir, landed in Tehran on Friday as part of an effort to reach a deal under which the U.S. and...
